name: Druidic Vocabulary
effect: Increase production of all buildings by tier, best bonus to lowest.
formula: (4000 * (12 - T))%, where T is building tier

name: Animal Companions
effect: Instantly gain 3 Animal assistants; more come based on time this Era.
formula: +(3 + 1.75 * x ^ 0.5), where x is time this Era

name: Natural Recycling
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively and multiplicatively based on total buildings owned.
formula: (0.4 * x ^ 0.4)% additive+multiplicative, where x is buildings owned

name: Earthly Bond
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively based on highest Stone Pillars built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2 * x), where x is highest Stone Pillars this Reincarnation

name: Bardic Knowledge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (16 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Maximum Mana

name: Shapeshifting
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on assistants owned.
formula: +(1.3 * x ^ 0.7), where x is assistants owned

name: Mabinogion
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique buildings by tier, best bonus to lowest.
formula: (12 * 1.8 ^ (12 - T))%, where T is building tier

name: Earthly Soul
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on highest Stone Pillars this Reincarnation.
formula: +(x ^ 0.25), where x is highest Stone Pillars this Reincarnation

name: Building Jungle
effect: Increase production of each building based on buildings of the same type owned.
formula: (1.5 * x ^ 0.9)%, where x is buildings of same type

name: Building Vines
effect: Increase spell duration based on highest Ziggurats built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is highest Ziggurats this Reincarnation

name: Lunar Cycle
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively by online time this Era; multiplicatively by offline time this Era.
formula: +(50 * x ^ 0.85) online; (0.5 * y ^ 0.5)% offline, where x/y are online/offline time this Era

name: Grove Farming
effect: Increase production of all buildings by tier; middle tiers get best bonus.
formula: (0.8 * ((6 - abs(6 - T)) ^ 4))%, where T is building tier
